title: olearia gardneri
intro: Olearia gardneri, also known as the Diggers Green Olearia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to southern Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Olearia gardneri is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used topically in the form of a salve or cream.
